info: After hitting the target up to (LHT: 5, MED: 5, HVY: 4) times, Grim will be applied for 6 seconds. This status effect applies a +25% damage and +50% posture damage modifier to all incoming attacks. Grim is affected by the damage modifier cap. Grim stacks can also be gained from critical attacks that have the M1 tag.
name: Grim
in_game_desc: Once enough stacks have been applied, Grim is applied for 6s, increasing all incoming damage by 25% and incoming posture damage by 50%.
